title: ProvenanceRewriteResult v1
description: Result of node.rewrite_provenance: the correction actually applied (field, previous and new value, whether the engine-assembled novelty-delta card claim was synchronized), plus idempotency metadata and the current budget snapshot.

delta_claim_updated.description: True when the current idea card retains the engine-reserved novelty-delta claim and its closest-prior identity was synchronized. False when a reviewed card revision had already withdrawn or replaced that scientific claim; the current provenance trace is corrected without resurrecting it, while the original value remains pinned in the archived generation pack.

grounding_audit_reset.description: True only when the retained reserved claim was rewritten and the node carried a grounding_audit, which was reset to null because it certified the prior claim text. False when no active claim changed or no grounding_audit existed.
